Happy Birthday, Elmo.

You have this rare way of making people feel like they belong. You've given so much to so many people, so today is just about you.

The world is warmer and a lot more interesting because you're in it.

Out of everyone you've brought together, I'm so lucky our paths crossed too.

Yurisa
